name: RDE Improvements, Secret Manager integration, DNS provider selection, Copilot write approval, Kube 1.35
summary: Hey Team, A lot shipped this cycle. Kubernetes 1.34 and 1.35 upgrades are fully complete across production clusters, closing out the first half of 2026 on the infrastructure side. On the product side, this release is largely about giving teams more control: over how secrets are managed, over how D ...
